a:r.a:t: Romie has great answer quality among all competitors when it comes to trip planning; Penny has highlights in interaction.
We're planning our honeymoon in Paris for 3 days - could you suggest a romantic itinerary?我们想在巴黎度蜜月3天，能推荐些浪漫的行程吗？
*Multi language, but doesnt adapt to language used at the moment
adapt to language used at the moment
1. Find flights from May 1st to 3rd./Find hotels under €50 per night
2. Find flights/hotels for 2 adults and a baby
Answer ignored "2 adults and a baby"
Romie can return correct answer for all queries
I'm a Muslim chef, and I plan to stay at Paris this weekend. Please help me plan it.
Answer contains inapproriate answers, doesn't show culture sensitivity
takes culture into consideration , return approriate answer
We're planning our honeymoon in Paris for 3 days - could you suggest a romantic itinerary
Where can I change my RMB into Euro in Paris
Add some shopping experience to my Paris honeymoon trip
Add a day of shopping at the end of the previous plan
Booking's AI trip planner add a couple hours of shopping activity into every's plan basing on the attraction location

Take my child to Tokyo for 7 days, including a visit to Tokyo Disneyland. We have a lot of luggage, so an airport transfer would be ideal. Please arrange an itinerary with both budget and premium plan
Like a robot with no empathy
Booking's AI trip planner shows empathy, sounds like a human
I want to find a hotel with a view of sea.
I want to go to Hongkong next Monday. Please find flights and hotels for me.
ack of price information in cards
trip planner shows summaried hotel instruction.
1. I want to contact customer service. | 2. Your service was terrible. I want to complain!
4. I am in the airport right now but the airport staff said they can not find my booking! | 5. I've arrived at hotel but I can't check in!
Direct to CS page (asked for CS and urgent cases)
Penny provides support center call, shows empathy (asked for CS and urgent cases)
